access.guest_fallback_message: Detailed explanations are available for logged-in Saola students only.

q34.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn E, bài viết nêu: "The berry is coated in a thin, red film (epicarp) that contains a white, sugary mucilaginous flesh (mesocarp). Inside this pulp are the seeds, in the form of two beans coupled at their flat surface. The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp).". Cụm epicarp khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q34.evidence: The berry is coated in a thin, red film (epicarp) that contains a white, sugary mucilaginous flesh (mesocarp). Inside this pulp are the seeds, in the form of two beans coupled at their flat surface. The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp)._

q35.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn E, bài viết nêu: "The berry is coated in a thin, red film (epicarp) that contains a white, sugary mucilaginous flesh (mesocarp). Inside this pulp are the seeds, in the form of two beans coupled at their flat surface. The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp).". Cụm mesocarp khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q35.evidence: The berry is coated in a thin, red film (epicarp) that contains a white, sugary mucilaginous flesh (mesocarp). Inside this pulp are the seeds, in the form of two beans coupled at their flat surface. The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp)._

q36.explanation: Cần điền/chọn thông tin đúng từ bài đọc. Ở đoạn E, bài viết nêu: "The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp). When this is peeled off, the real bean appears with another very thin silvery film surrounding it. The bean is bluish green, verging on bronze, in colour and is at the most 11 millimetres long and 8 millimetres wide.". Cụm endocarp khớp với yêu cầu câu hỏi và đúng giới hạn từ nếu đề có quy định.
q36.evidence: The beans are in turn coated with a kind of resistant, golden-yellow parchment (endocarp). When this is peeled off, the real bean appears with another very thin silvery film surrounding it. The bean is bluish green, verging on bronze, in colour and is at the most 11 millimetres long and 8 millimetres wide._
